source_checks.result: Official KRA race site route was checked, but captured text did not expose complete 2026-06 meeting_date + racecourse rows.

promotion_status.reason: No captured official KRA route currently provides complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows. Keep out of manual-june-2026-* until a month-capable official source is captured.

next_steps: Find a KRA no-login monthly racing schedule, annual implementation plan, PDF, or API endpoint that exposes 2026-06 dates and racecourses.
Expected racecourse labels should only be used after source rows confirm the target dates; do not infer Seoul, Busan-Gyeongnam, or Jeju dates from usual weekly patterns.
Promote only after every row includes meeting_date, racecourse, source_url, parser, and last_checked.
